message:
test(proptest): expand recorder_lexical_schema (15→29) and cx_capabilities (17→27) property tests (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Also fix pre-existing compilation issues in recorder_lexical_schema:
- Restructure arb_document_fields() to use nested tuple groups
  (proptest only supports tuples up to 12 elements)
- Fix borrow-after-move in fingerprint_lowercase test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
